data.change_summary: Addressed all 3 pending amendments from round 1 review. (1) Reverted service-level plan_hash auto-population from service.rs and moved it to the FS adapter layer in fs.rs, where it applies as backfill-only: new rows and existing rows with plan_hash=None get the snapshot's plan_hash, but rows that already have a plan_hash are never overwritten. This eliminates the terminal replay false-positive (amendment 1) and the idempotent start/completion replay conflict after plan evolution (amendment 3). (2) Added a started_at equality guard to the runless-to-named fallback in update_task_run at fs.rs — the open runless entry's started_at must match the caller's started_at before the match is accepted, preventing backfill of the wrong legacy attempt (amendment 2). Updated the existing conflicting-plan_hash test to use matching started_at. Added 3 new regression tests covering each amendment scenario.
outstanding_risks: Pre-existing formatting drift in tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs is unrelated to these changes but will appear in cargo fmt --check across the full workspace.

steps.description: Reverted service-level plan_hash auto-population in record_bead_start and update_task_run (service.rs). Both functions now pass the caller's raw plan_hash (which may be None) straight through to the lineage layer, restoring original terminal-replay-safe semantics where option_conflicts(Some(x), None) is always false
Added FsTaskRunLineageStore::snapshot_plan_hash() helper in fs.rs that reads the milestone snapshot's plan_hash for backfill-only auto-population
Auto-populate plan_hash from snapshot in record_task_run_start (fs.rs) for new entry creation path — uses or_else(|| snapshot_plan_hash) only when caller passes None

Auto-populate plan_hash from snapshot in record_task_run_start (fs.rs) backfill_running_entry path — after backfill, if entry still has plan_hash: None, reads snapshot. Rows that already have a plan_hash are untouched

Auto-populate plan_hash from snapshot in update_task_run (fs.rs) non-terminal finalization path — added else-if branch after the explicit plan_hash handling: when both caller plan_hash and entry.plan_hash are None, reads snapshot

Amendment 2: Added started_at equality guard to the runless-to-named fallback at fs.rs:3044. The single-open-runless-entry match arm now requires entries[*index].started_at == started_at. A new arm handles the mismatch case with a descriptive error message including both timestamps

Updated completion_with_conflicting_plan_hash_rejects_runless_match test to use matching started_at (now), so the runless match is accepted and the plan_hash conflict detection exercises correctly under the new started_at guard

Added test terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds: completes bead with plan_hash=None (auto-populated to hash_v1), evolves plan to hash_v2, replays same terminal completion with plan_hash=None — must succeed without conflict

Added test runless_match_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches: starts bead without run_id at time T, tries to complete with run_id but started_at=T+10s — must fail with 'does not match requested started_at' error

Added test start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict: starts bead with plan_hash=None (auto-populated to hash_v1), evolves plan to hash_v2, replays same start with plan_hash=None — must not conflict because existing row already has hash_v1 and snapshot auto-population is skipped
Ran cargo test (1161 total: 349+128+1+683 all pass), cargo clippy -- -D warnings (clean), cargo fmt --check (modified files clean, pre-existing agent_execution_test.rs formatting unrelated)

validation_evidence: cargo test: 1161 total tests passed (349 lib + 128 integration + 1 doc + 683 unit), 0 failed
cargo clippy -- -D warnings: no warnings or errors
cargo fmt --check: service.rs and fs.rs pass; only pre-existing formatting diffs in unrelated tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs
terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds: starts+completes under plan v1 (auto-populated hash_v1), evolves to v2, replays terminal completion with plan_hash=None — succeeds and retains hash_v1
runless_match_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches: runless start at T, named completion at T+10s → rejected with 'does not match requested started_at'
start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict: start with plan_hash=None auto-populates hash_v1, plan evolves to v2, replay start with plan_hash=None → no conflict, retains hash_v1
plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot (from round 1): still passes — auto-population now happens at adapter layer instead of service layer
explicit_plan_hash_takes_precedence_over_snapshot (from round 1): still passes — caller-provided hash wins over snapshot
runless_start_completed_with_named_run_id (from round 1): still passes — runless match accepted when started_at matches
completion_with_conflicting_plan_hash_rejects_runless_match: updated to use matching started_at, now correctly tests plan_hash conflict path
